parameters.content:
# WF-04 — VPS & AI Infrastructure Monitoring

## Purpose
Centralized health monitoring for the ali-n8n.com production stack.
Covers server resources, security posture, backup integrity, and AI API budget.
Delivers a daily HTML report via Gmail + real-time credit alerts.

## Architecture — Two Independent Tracks

### Track A — Daily System Health Audit (07:10 AM)
Triggered daily at 07:10 AM — 10min offset after the bash cron job at 07:00 AM.
See "Schedule and Timing" sticky for rationale.

Data sources (single parallel pass):
  • vps_metrics.json  → local bash script (disk, RAM, Docker, backup, n8n)
  • Hostinger API     → VPS state, plan, public IP
  • Hostinger API     → snapshot history & age
  • Hostinger API     → Monarx malware scan results

All data evaluated in Build VPS Report against fixed thresholds.
→ See "Build VPS Report — Code Node" sticky for threshold details.

Output: styled HTML email
  ✅ Green header — all checks nominal
  🔴 Red header   — one or more alerts

### Track B — Hourly AI Credit Watch (every 2 hours)
Polls GET https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/credits every 2 hours.
remaining_balance = total_credits − total_usage
Alert fires only when balance < $2.00 — silent when healthy.

  balance < $2.00 → Gmail alert → Telegram (disabled) → StopAndError
  balance ≥ $2.00 → silent exit

⚠️ Alert fires every 2 hours while balance stays low.
   Add a Redis cooldown flag if alert spam becomes an issue.

## Error Handling
Critical nodes        : retryOnFail (3 attempts, 5s delay)
Gmail nodes           : onError continueErrorOutput → StopAndError
Global error workflow : gvhDaCea1oROHUrb
Data freshness guard  : vps_metrics.json older than 30min → immediate throw
                        → no report sent → global error workflow fires

## Dependencies
  Hostinger API   → VPS state, backups, Monarx (VM ID: 1101276)
  Gmail OAuth2    → aliboussechill@gmail.com
  OpenRouter API  → GET /v1/credits (Track B)
  Telegram Bot    → disabled — set real chatId before enabling
  vps_metrics.sh  → cron at 07:00 AM on VPS
                    output : /data/metrics/vps_metrics.json
                    logs   : /home/adlin/metrics/vps_metrics.log

⚠️ Both Telegram nodes contain placeholder chatId "YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID".
   Do not enable without replacing this value first.

Author: Ali Boussecsou — ali-n8n.com

## Schedule & Timing — Why 07:10 AM?

vps_metrics.sh runs via cron at 07:00 AM.
Execution time: ~5 seconds under normal conditions.

This workflow triggers at 07:10 AM (10-minute buffer) to ensure:
  1. vps_metrics.json is fully written and flushed to disk before n8n reads it
  2. No race condition between file write and the Read VPS Metrics node

⚠️ If you reschedule the cron job, update this trigger accordingly.
⚠️ If the server reboots around 07:00 AM, the JSON may not be generated.
   The 30-minute freshness guard in Build VPS Report catches this
   and fires the global error workflow automatically.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ ALERT: OpenRouter Balance Critical (< $2.00)
parameters.message:
=
⚠️ Action Required: Low Balance

The AI budget for your automation workflow has reached the safety threshold.

Reporting & Monitoring — Shopify Order Manager
${{ $json.remaining_credits }}
Top up — OpenRouter

Please top up your account to prevent any interruption in Shopify order processing and monitoring.

Generated by n8n | {{ new Date().toUTCString() }}

parameters.content:
## Build VPS Report — Code Node

Aggregates all data sources and evaluates 8 alert conditions sequentially.
Each hit appends to an alerts[] array.
Final alert count drives email subject prefix and header color.

## Alert Thresholds

  Condition                          Level   Threshold
  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Disk usage                         🔴      ≥ 80%
  RAM usage                          🔴      ≥ 85%
  Pending OS updates                 🟡      > 20 packages
  Hostinger snapshot age             🔴      > 8 days
  Docker container status            🔴      any container not "Up"
  n8n auto-update                    🔴      status === "failed"
  Local n8n backup                   🔴      status !== "ok"
  Monarx malware scan                🔴      malicious > 0

## Data Freshness Guard
Runs before all thresholds.
If vps_metrics.json generated_at age > 30 min → throws immediately.
No report is sent. Global error workflow fires a high-priority alert.

## Email Output
  subject prefix  : ✅ VPS Nominal  |  🔴 N issue(s) detected
  header color    : green #27ae60   |  red #e74c3c

parameters.text:

[Click here to top up](https://openrouter.ai/credits)

_Generated by n8n Instance — Casablanca_
No report, just check. / Custom message

parameters.errorMessage: ERROR: Send AI credits alert / WF-04

parameters.content:
## Track B — OpenRouter Credit Monitor

Trigger   : every 2 hours
Endpoint  : GET https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/credits

Logic (Remaining Credits — Code node):
  remaining_balance = total_credits − total_usage
  is_low_balance    = remaining_balance < 2.00

Is Balance Below $2? (IF node):
  TRUE  → Send AI Credits Alert (Gmail)
        → Fallback Telegram — AI Credits (DISABLED)
        → StopAndError → global error workflow
  FALSE → silent exit — no output, no noise

⚠️ Telegram node is disabled. Set real chatId before enabling.
⚠️ Alert fires every 2 hours while balance stays low.
   Consider a Redis cooldown flag to prevent alert spam.

## Meta
Version     : 1.0.0
Status      : stable — production
Last update : 2026-05
n8n version : 2.15.1
Timezone    : Africa/Casablanca

Changelog:
  1.0.0 — Initial production release
    • Dual-track architecture (daily health + hourly credit watch)
    • 8-condition threshold engine with freshness guard
    • Hostinger API integration (VPS + backups + Monarx)
    • Gmail delivery + Telegram fallback (disabled by default)
